title: Technical Service Engineer (Chemical plant)
description:
Our client is a leading chemical solutions provider, specializing in innovative products and services for the oil and gas industry. Due to their current expansion plan, they are looking for Technical Service Engineer to join their team, in hopes of developing the current high performing team. They are located at West.

Job Responsibilities:

  • Technical Monitoring & Troubleshooting: Monitor and analyse chemical programs using plant data and laboratory results, conduct troubleshooting, and prepare incident and findings reports to ensure stable operations.

  • Client Support & Engagement: Respond promptly to client queries and concerns, propose value-added initiatives and improvement plans, and maintain strong client relationships to ensure satisfaction.

  • Operational Excellence & Safety: Drive reliability, safety, and operational excellence by coordinating with site technicians, ensuring HSSE compliance, and supporting housekeeping and on-site activities.

  • Cross-Functional Collaboration: Share technical findings with internal teams, coordinate on new programs, and support KPI achievement through close collaboration with technical stakeholders.

  • Business & Operational Planning: Identify new business opportunities, support report preparation, manage inventory and delivery planning, and ensure timely submission of customer monitoring reports.

Requirements:

  • Min Diploma in Chemical Engineering in Oil and Gas related field with 3 years of experience
  • Possess knowledge of Chemical Engineering Principles and operations
  • Experience working in Refinery, Ethylene plant will be an added advantage

Interested candidates who wish to apply for the advertised position, please click APPLY NOW or email an updated copy of your resume/cv.

We regret that only shortlisted candidate will be notified.

Email: jobs@recruitpedia.sg

Recruitpedia Pte. Ltd.
